start.text: Driver, thank goodness! I have a board meeting at the Financial Plaza in less than a minute. If I'm late, the merger falls apart!

choices.label: Buckle up, Marcus! We're taking the express route. (+Rush Bonus)
Hop in, I'll get you there safely and smoothly.
Sorry pal, I'm off duty right now.

accept_rush.text: That's what I like to hear! Get me there in under 45 seconds and I'll throw in a $300 hazard bonus!

accept_standard.text: Much appreciated. Let's head for Financial Plaza — please keep the ride steady!

decline.text: Unbelievable! Good help is impossible to find in this metropolis...

start.text: Yo driver! My headlining set at the Neon Club starts soon and I've got my custom synth deck in the trunk. Ready to roll?

choices.label: Let's turn up the bass and blast across the city!
Can't take you right now, Lyra.

accept_dj.text: Legendary! Follow the glowing waypoint pillar. Let's make some noise!

decline.text: Aww man, the crowd is gonna be waiting...

start.text: Keep your voice down... I am carrying a quantum drive with breakthrough energy grid simulations. We must reach Advanced Tech Labs immediately.

choices.label: Understood, Doctor. Full throttle to the Tech Labs.

accept_science.text: Excellent. Keep your eyes on the road and let's get moving!

decline.text: Very well. I will find another courier.

start.text: Hello! I'm visiting MetroPulse to admire the skyscrapers. Could you take me to the Central Spire in the heart of downtown?

choices.label: Sorry, not taking fares right now.

decline.text: Oh, no worries at all. Have a nice day!
